## Checklist

- [ ] The change is bounded to one coherent outcome.
- [ ] Public documentation contains only polished project material.
- [ ] Formatting, linting, typing, tests, and relevant builds pass.
- [ ] Direct dependency changes are documented and justified.
- [ ] No credentials, private references, or generated working material are included.
